description:
## What
Expose a Prometheus-compatible /metrics endpoint (or separate internal listener) that publishes counters, gauges, and histograms for the smallhold server.

## Why
Operators need observability into request rates, latency, delivery queue health, and connection counts without reading raw logs.

## Scope
- Integrate metrics and metrics-exporter-prometheus crates
- Register standard HTTP, delivery, SQLite, and connection metrics
- Gate behind config flag [monitoring] metrics_enabled / metrics_addr
- Instrument axum middleware, delivery worker, and SQLx layer
title: Prometheus metrics endpoint
